transcript: Speaker A: तू किती दिवसांपासून करतोयस? [How many days have you been doing it?] Speaker B: कदाचित... 10-12 दिवस झाले असेल. [Maybe... 10-12 days have passed.] Speaker A: मग आता बेटर वाटतंय का? [So does it feel better now?] Speaker B: हो म्हणजे... बोलून दाखवतो. I speak English very confidently now. [Yes, I mean... I'll speak and show you. I speak English very confidently now.] Speaker A: ओ भारी इंग्लिश बोलायला लागलास की! [Oh, you've started speaking great English!] Speaker C: MySivi app वर 1 कोटी लोकं spoken English ची प्रॅक्टिस करतायत. तुम्ही पण आजच सुरू करा. ट्रायल फक्त ₹1 मध्ये. [On MySivi app, 1 crore people are practicing spoken English. You also start today. Trial for just ₹1.]
on_screen_text: MySivi AI, Start English Learning - MySivi, 10M+ Downloads, Install, MySivi is now MySivi, Improve English speaking with AI, Start your English learning with a Trial at No Cost | Practice English Now, MySivi Premium, LIMITED TIME OFFER, ₹1, Autopay, cancel anytime., 1,200 learners purchased today, 24/7 AI English Teacher, 500+ Exercises and Lessons, Unlimited Access
summary: A girl on a video call asks her friend about his English practice, and he confidently demonstrates his improved speaking skills after just 10-12 days. The ad then showcases the MySivi app's popularity with over 10 million downloads and promotes a premium trial for just ₹1.
